risk_description: Payment exceptions may not be captured in a centralized workflow
control_activity: Create each payment exception as a uniquely identified case

risk_description: Payment exception cases may contain incomplete or missing information
control_activity: Require mandatory payment and exception fields before investigation begins

risk_description: Open payment exception cases may remain unassigned
control_activity: Display unassigned cases in a dedicated team lead control view

risk_description: Cases may be assigned an incorrect or missing operational priority
control_activity: Require a controlled priority value for each active case

risk_description: High-value payment exceptions may not receive appropriate management attention
control_activity: Flag high-value cases and require High or Critical priority

risk_description: Potential duplicate payments may not be escalated
control_activity: Flag duplicate payment risk cases and require escalation review

risk_description: SLA breaches may not be identified or reviewed promptly
control_activity: Calculate SLA due dates and automatically flag breached cases

risk_description: Aged payment exceptions may remain unresolved without management visibility
control_activity: Calculate case aging and flag cases exceeding the aging threshold

risk_description: High-risk or overdue cases may not be escalated
control_activity: Require escalation for defined high-risk SLA and aging conditions

risk_description: Cases may be resolved without sufficient investigation evidence
control_activity: Require investigation notes before a case can be resolved or closed

risk_description: Cases may be closed without a documented closure reason
control_activity: Require a controlled closure reason before case closure

risk_description: Cases may bypass the approved status lifecycle
control_activity: Validate status transitions and prevent direct movement from New to Closed

risk_description: Invalid or inconsistent status values may affect workflow and reporting
control_activity: Restrict status selection to the controlled lifecycle values

risk_description: Inconsistent exception categorization may reduce reporting accuracy
control_activity: Use a controlled payment exception taxonomy
control_evidence: Exception type field and validation result

risk_description: Changes to a case may not be retained for audit review
control_activity: Retain history of status priority ownership escalation and notes

risk_description: Escalations may occur without a documented reason or accountable owner
control_activity: Require escalation reason date and escalation owner

risk_description: Management may lack reliable information about exception volumes and performance
control_activity: Provide standardized operational and management reporting

risk_description: Control reviewers may not have sufficient evidence that controls operated effectively
control_activity: Provide control evidence reporting for key exception controls

risk_description: Invalid or inconsistent case data may affect decisions and reporting
control_activity: Run defined data quality checks against payment exception records

risk_description: Customer-impacting payment exceptions may not receive sufficient priority
control_activity: Capture customer impact flag and include affected cases in priority review
